emails.body: Re: Hi!!! I'll be there. I didn't sign up for the organized activities. I'll just be hanging out. The Swap Group is having dinner Wednesday night, if you haven't already made plans do you want to join us, we're about 15 in number right now! Andrea Calo@ENRON 04/26/2001 01:07 PM
